---
name: Documentation
about: Report missing or unclear documentation
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

---

## Description
What documentation is missing or needs to be improved?

## Location
Where is this documentation needed? (e.g., README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, wiki, inline code comments)

## Current State
What currently exists (if anything)? Copy relevant content here if applicable.

## Proposed Documentation
Describe what the documentation should cover:
- Key concepts to explain
- Usage examples needed
- Edge cases or gotchas to mention
- Related resources or links

## Type of Documentation
- [ ] README update
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING guide
- [ ] API/Code documentation
- [ ] Installation guide
- [ ] Usage examples
- [ ] Troubleshooting guide
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Additional Context
Any other context or screenshots that would help.
